root_text.an5.129:1.3: Mātā jīvitā voropitā hoti, pitā jīvitā voropito hoti, arahaṁ jīvitā voropito hoti, tathāgatassa duṭṭhena cittena lohitaṁ uppāditaṁ hoti, saṅgho bhinno hoti.
root_text.an5.129:1.4: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca āpāyikā nerayikā parikuppā atekicchā”ti.

translation_text.an5.129:1.1: “Mendicants, these five fatal wounds lead to a place of loss, to hell.
translation_text.an5.129:1.3: Murdering your mother or father or a perfected one; maliciously shedding the blood of a Realized One; and causing a schism in the Saṅgha.
translation_text.an5.129:1.4: These five fatal wounds lead to a place of loss, to hell.”

variant_text.an5.129:1.3: Mātā → mātaraṁ (mr) | pitā → pitaraṁ (mr) | voropito → voropitā (mr) | arahaṁ → arahā (sya-all); arahantaṁ (mr)
